creator: peo@intersonic.se
text:
A HP ProLiant G4 with built in SA6i and a SA6404.
Three logical drives, one on the 6i and two on the 6404, all visible
during POST.

During install and after, FreeBSD will only see the 6i, the additional
controller is not recognized when booting the OS.  A quick check with
an OpenBSD boot disk finds all three drives.

How-To-Repeat: Install a HP 6400 controller in a ProLiant DL3480 G4 and boot.
